AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, KATHERINE A AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-26-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-25-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-03-2014

BOND #1001025611 IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,000.00 FILED BY OTHER WEAVER, KENNETH R. (RECEIVER) EXECUTED BY SURETY COMPANY AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-26-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

LAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER APPROVING RECEIVER'S FINAL ACCOUNT AND REPORT, DISCHARGING RECEIVER, EXONERATING RECEIVER'S BOND, DISSOLVING PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION, TERMINATING RECEIVERSHIP AND DIRECTING PAYMENT OF RECEIVERSHIP DEFICIT IS GRANTED. RECEIVER'S ACCOUNT IS APPROVED IN ITS ENTIRETY; RECEIVERSHIP IS TERMINATED; PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DISSOLVED; RECEIVER'S AND PLAINTIFF'S BONDS ARE EXONERATED; PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY TO RECEIVER $2,497.93. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED ANF FILED IN OPEN COURT JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: R. GOULDING; DEPT.501; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Approving Receiver'S Final Account And Report, Discharging Receiver, Exonerating Receiver'S Bond, Dissolving Preliminary Injunction, Terminating Receivership And Directing Payment Of Receivership Deficit
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bales, for plaintiff JPMorgan

The Courts tentative ruling is adopted :
PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order Approving Receiver's Final Account And Report, Discharging Receiver, Exonerating Receiver's Bond, Dissolving Preliminary Injunction, Terminating Receivership And Directing Payment Of Receivership Deficit is GRANTED. Receiver's account is approved in its entirety; receivership is terminated; preliminary injunction is dissolved; receiver's and plaintiff's bonds are exonerated; plaintiff shall pay to receiver $2,497.93. No opposition filed. Order signed anf filed in open court Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: R. Goulding; Dept.501; Not Reported

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Jan-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
